calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Aug-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Robert Cohen, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, National Collegiate Student Loan Trust 2007-1, A Delaware Statutory Trust(s)

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Corey Hicks
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Dismissal of Defendants Does 1-15 and Defendant Gloria Lee on file.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $24,968.53
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,639.79
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $627.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $0
Judgment signed in open court.
